name: io.github.huseyinstif/klaket-mcp
description: Let AI agents watch videos: word-timestamped transcripts, speaker labels, scenes, chapters and exact-moment search from any video URL or file, fully local

environmentVariables.name: KLAKET_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Klaket API (default: http://localhost:8484)

environmentVariables.name: KLAKET_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for cloud/authenticated deployments (not needed for local self-hosting)
